productName: Shatter j's infused pre-roll creme brulee 1g
description: Ready-to-spark indica infused pre-roll of Creme Brulee, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, coffee, and chestnut, with deep, easygoing relaxation. A little goes a long way.
